message:
fix(codegen): Fix module-level import shadowing and class method shadowing

- var_hoisting.zig: Check module_level_from_imports for hoisted vars
- conditionals.zig: Check module_level_from_imports for walrus operator vars
- class_methods.zig: Rename local params that shadow class methods to avoid Zig conflicts

Fixes shadowing errors for imported symbols like dtype, equal, transpose
and class method conflicts like 'variable' in poly1d class
